case_title: SUNSTREAM NETWORKS, LTD VS. RAMP RATE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,159.80 FILED BY SUNSTREAM NETWORKS, LTD AS TO DEFENDANT RAMP RATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMP RATE

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS DENIED. THE REQUEST DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE POSTPONEMENT. THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNSTREAM NETWORKS, LTD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-24-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMP RATE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNSTREAM NETWORKS, LTD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMP RATE $2,770.00 PRINCIPAL, $389.80 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,264.80, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMP RATE HEARING SET FOR AUG-05-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
